MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Daniel Stern, Esq. for plaintiff Park Merced Investors Properties LLC with property manager present.
David Cross, Esq. appearing on limited scope representation for defendants Andrew Snider and Aaron Wiley, who are both present.

This cause comes on regularly for settlement conference. Settlement discussions held. The case settled. Parties enter into a signed Stipulation for Entry of Future Judgment and Settlement Agreement, which is not filed. Trial date vacated.
